2605.22422.title: FastTab: A Fast Table Recognizer with a Tiny Recursive Module and 1D Transformers
2605.22422.paper_summary: Table structure recognition (TSR) requires both table-level coherence (row/column counts, headers, spanning cells) and precise separator localization. We introduce FastTab, a grid-centric TSR model that avoids autoregressive HTML decoding by combining (i) a lightweight Tiny Recursive Module (TRM) for global reasoning and (ii) axial 1D Transformer encoders that capture long-range dependencies along rows and columns. The model predicts row/column counts, header rows, and separators to construct a grid, then infers rowspan/colspan using ROI-aligned cell features. Across four benchmarks (PubTabNet, FinTabNet, PubTables-1M, and SciTSR), FastTab achieves competitive structure recovery performance while operating at low-latency inference. We further study robustness under pixel-level anonymisation and show an extension to curved separators for camera-captured documents. The source code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/hamdilaziz/FastTab .
2605.22422.paper_summary_zh: 表格結構識別（TSR）需要表格層級的一致性（行/列計數、標題、跨單元格）以及精確的分隔符定位。<lb/>我們介紹了 FastTab，一種以網格為中心的 TSR 模型，通過結合（i）輕量級的 Tiny Recursive Module（TRM）進行全局推理和（ii）捕捉行和列之間長距離依賴的軸向 1D Transformer 編碼器，避免了自回歸的 HTML 解碼。<lb/>該模型預測行/列計數、標題行和分隔符以構建網格，然後使用 ROI 對齊的單元格特徵推斷 rowspan/colspan。<lb/>在四個基準測試（PubTabNet、FinTabNet、PubTables-1M 和 SciTSR）中，FastTab 在低延遲推理下實現了具有競爭力的結構恢復性能。<lb/>我們進一步研究了在像素級匿名化下的穩健性，並展示了對於相機捕捉文檔的曲線分隔符的擴展。<lb/>源代碼將在 https://github.com/hamdilaziz/FastTab 公開提供。
2605.22422.author: Laziz Hamdi et.al.
2605.22422.authors: Laziz Hamdi, Amine Tamasna, Pascal Boisson, Thierry Paquet
